OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Derek Skidmore, is present. Represented by Patricia Skidmore.
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Ricky Rickerson-Riesen, is present.
Attorney, Brady Dewar , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-29-2010 is vacated.

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT RICKY RICKERSON-RIESEN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. THE SUMMONS CORRECTLY IDENTIFIED THE CASE NUMBER AND IS NOT INVALIDATED BY THE COURT CLERK HAVING STAMPED THE WRONG NUMBER, AN ERROR THAT HAS BEEN CORRECTED IN THE COURT FILES, DEFENDANT HAS 5 DAYS TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
